title: Sableye customizable player model
description: play as sableye from cobblemon in customizable player models!
body:
NEW DESCRIPTION i might not work on this again, so see the cobblemon asset license (bottom) as that is what the project is now. future versions may not have the same license after but not including Mar 20, 2025 (all currently existing versions are fine to fork to clarify)

OLD DESCRIPTION a forgotten sableye player model on my pc that i made. it lets you play as sableye in minecraft. thanks to side effect for helping with the armor.

how to use:
1. unzip file
2. open minecraft with the dependency mods installed and see the top left.
3. click file > export
4. in this menu click the top option and turn it into "export mode: model". (if editing before exporting, save it first) p.s. if cloning is NOT selected with an "x", you will not have to worry about model stealing. a uuid lock is overkill imo.
5. put your new file in the player_models folder.
6. while in the game press G

- it should work on any version, but only tested on 1.19.2+
- it effects the vision perspective height in minecraft.
- armor model finished.
- shield animation unfinished, might be removed.
- if you found this unlisted project early, yes you can use it to play minecraft, yes you can record yourself using it, yes you may modify it for personal use only (do not distribute to other players, although this is not very enforced tbh.) (although i might just open source it later.)
- it might effect other stuff in gameplay too, been on my pc for a long while. i.e. player height.
- moving mouth animation for voice chat.
- [https://gitlab.com/cable-mc/cobblemon-assets/-/blob/master/LICENSE?ref_type=heads](https://gitlab.com/cable-mc/cobblemon-assets/-/blob/master/LICENSE?ref_type=heads)
